zh.Beeston St Lawrence, Norfolk, England: 英國諾福爾可貝斯頓 聖 勞倫斯
zh.Burnham Thorpe, Norfolk, England: 英國諾福爾可伯納姆 索普
zh.lifeSummary: Sibilla St Omer是Edmund de St Omer的女兒，於1374年出生在英國諾福爾可伯納姆 索普。她於1389年與Sir John Wythe Withe結婚。他們至少是1個女兒的父母。她去世於1420年12月10日在英國諾福爾可貝斯頓 聖 勞倫斯享年46歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Sibilla St Omer是Edmund de St Omer的女儿，于1374年出生在英国諾福爾可伯納姆 索普。她于1389年与Sir John Wythe Withe结婚。他们至少是1个女儿的父母。她去世于1420年12月10日在英国諾福爾可貝斯頓 聖 勞倫斯享年46岁。

nameMeanings.name: St
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: 1  French: habitational name from any of the places so called, for example in Normandy, named from a religious dedication to a (male) St. Clair.
2  North American variant spelling of   St  .   Claire  .

variants.name: Claire
meanings: Variant of   Clair  , an altered form of German   Klare  .

nameMeanings.name: Omer
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Arabic/Muslim Ahmed, Mohamed, Mohammed, Tarig, Mohammad, Murad, Abdirahman, Abdul, Abdulla, Abdulrahim, Ali, Amin.

variants.name: Omar
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Arabic/Muslim Mohammed, Mohamed, Ali, Omar, Ahmed, Ahmad, Hassan, Abdul, Husam, Khalid, Mohammad, Mohd.

Muslim: from the Arabic personal name Omar of uncertain etymology, found almost exclusively among Sunni Muslims. It is thought to be related to Arabic ʿāmir ‘prosperous, full of life, large, substantial’ (see Amir 2). The root word ʿumr means ‘life’. ʿUmar bin al-Khaṭṭāb was the second of the ‘rightly guided’ caliphs (ruled 634–44); he was known by the title al-Fārūq ‘the distinguisher’, i.e. one who distinguishes between truth and falsehood. Compare Omer and Umar .
Catalan: topographic name for someone who lived by a group of elm trees, from the collective form of om ‘elm’.

nameMeanings.name: Sibilla
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From the name (Greek Sibylla or Sybilla, with confusion over the vowels from an early period) of a class of ancient prophetesses inspired by Apollo. According to medieval theology, they were pagans denied the knowledge of Christ but blessed by God with some insight into things to come and accordingly admitted to heaven. It was thus regarded as a respectable name to be borne by Christians. This name was introduced to England by the Normans and enjoyed considerable popularity in the Middle Ages.

variants.name: Sybilla
meanings: From the name (Greek Sibylla or Sybilla, with confusion over the vowels from an early period) of a class of ancient prophetesses inspired by Apollo. It was thus regarded as a respectable name to be borne by Christians. This name was introduced to England by the Normans and enjoyed considerable popularity in the Middle Ages.

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: Sibilla St Omer was born in 1374, in Burnham Thorpe, Norfolk, England as the daughter of Edmund de St Omer. She married Sir John Wythe Withe in 1389. They were the parents of at least 1 daughter. She died on 10 December 1420, in Beeston St Lawrence, Norfolk, England, at the age of 46.

fr.lifeSummary: Sibilla St Omer est née en 1374, à Burnham Thorpe, Norfolk, Angleterre, fille d’Edmund de St Omer. Elle a épousé Sir John Wythe Withe en 1389. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fille. Elle est décédée le 10 décembre 1420, à Beeston St Lawrence, Norfolk, Angleterre, à l’âge de 46 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Sibilla St Omer wurde 1374 in Burnham Thorpe, Norfolk, England, als Tochter von Edmund de St Omer geboren. Sie hat 1389 Sir John Wythe Withe geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Tochter. Sie starb am 10. Dezember 1420 im Alter von 46 Jahren in Beeston St Lawrence, Norfolk, England.

it.lifeSummary: Sibilla St Omer è nata il nel 1374 nel Burnham Thorpe, Norfolk, England come figlia di Edmund de St Omer. Lei sposato Sir John Wythe Withe nel 1389. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlia. Morì il 10 dicembre 1420, nel Beeston St Lawrence, Norfolk, England, all'età di 46 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Sibilla St Omerは1374年にイギリスノーフォルクブルンハム ソルペでEdmund de St Omerの娘として生まれた。1389年にSir John Wythe Witheと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1420年12月10日にイギリスノーフォルクビーストン スト ラウレンスで46歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Sibilla St Omer(은)는 1374년 영국 노르폴크 번함 소에서 Edmund de St Omer의 딸로 태어났다. 그녀는 1389년 Sir John Wythe Withe(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1420년 12월 10일 영국 노르폴크 브이스턴 스트 로렌스에서 46세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Sibilla St Omer nasceu em 1374, em Burnham Thorpe, Norfolk, Inglaterra filha de Edmund de St Omer. Ela casou-se com Sir John Wythe Withe em 1389. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filha. Ela faleceu em 10 de dezembro de 1420, em Beeston St Lawrence, Norfolk, Inglaterra, com 46 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Sibilla St Omer родилась в 1374 г. в местности бурнам таурп, норфолк, Англия. Её отца звали Edmund de St Omer. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir John Wythe Withe в 1389 г. У них была по крайней мере 1 дочь. Она умерла 10 декабря 1420 г. в местности бистон ст ларенс, норфолк, Англия в возрасте 46 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Sibilla St Omer nació en 1374, en Burnham Thorpe, Norfolk, Inglaterra como hija de Edmund de St Omer. Se casó con Sir John Wythe Withe en 1389. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hija. Murió el 10 de diciembre de 1420, en Beeston St Lawrence, Norfolk, Inglaterra, a la edad de 46 años.
